ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the flower species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the flower species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the flower species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the flower species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "flower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flower being measured */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the flower */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_flower_id FOREIGN KEY ("flower_id") REFERENCES flowers ("flower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flowers" (
  "flower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flower */,
  "flower_name" TEXT /* Name of the flower */,
  "cultivar" TEXT /* Cultivar of the flower */,
  "growth_conditions" TEXT /* Growth conditions of the flower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical data point */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical data point (e.g., mean, median, standard deviation) */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the measurement */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurement */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the measurement */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the measurement */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the measurement */,
  "interquartile_range" REAL /* Interquartile range of the measurement */,
  "coefficient_of_variation" REAL /* Coefficient of variation of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_stats_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_user" (
  "role_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-user association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_user_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_tags_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
